bleedModel.description: No bleed. 0.5" no-print border on all sides. Nothing prints in this area.

perforation.description: Perforated rectangle inside the no-print border. Recipients tear along these edges to open.

surfaces.label: Outside

zones.label: No-Print Border
zones.rule: 0.5" border around all edges. Nothing can be printed in this area.

zones.label: Ink-Free Zone (Address + Postage)
zones.rule: No ink allowed. Must be completely white/blank. Reserved for recipient address and postage indicia.
zones.note: Top panel, 0.15" from fold, 0.125" from right perf edge

surfaces.llmPrompt:
You are designing the OUTSIDE of an 8.5×11" snap pack.

Canvas: 8.5" wide × 11" tall. NO BLEED — this is a no-bleed format.

IMPORTANT: There is a 0.5" NO-PRINT BORDER on all four sides. Nothing can be printed in this area. Your printable area starts 0.5" inward from each edge.

Perforated area: 7.5" × 10" (inside the no-print border). Recipients tear along these perforations to open.
Safe zone: 7.25" × 9.75" (0.125" inset from perforation) — all text and critical content must stay inside this.

The piece folds at the center (5.5" from top), creating two panels.

Zone restrictions:
- NO-PRINT BORDER: 0.5" on all sides — absolutely nothing prints here.
- INK-FREE ZONE: A 4" × 2.375" rectangle on the top panel (outside), positioned 0.125" from right perf edge and 0.15" above the fold. Must be COMPLETELY WHITE for recipient address and postage.

Design tips:
- The outside top panel is the address side — design around the ink-free zone.
- The outside bottom panel is fully customizable (within the no-print border).
- Do NOT use edge-to-edge backgrounds — there will always be a white border.
- This format is great for official notices, healthcare (HIPAA-compliant interior), and financial communications.

surfaces.label: Inside

zones.label: No-Print Border
zones.rule: 0.5" border around all edges. Nothing can be printed in this area.

surfaces.llmPrompt:
You are designing the INSIDE of an 8.5×11" snap pack.

Canvas: 8.5" wide × 11" tall. NO BLEED.

0.5" NO-PRINT BORDER on all sides. Printable area starts 0.5" inward.
Perforated area: 7.5" × 10".
Safe zone: 7.25" × 9.75" (0.125" inset from perforation).

The piece folds at 5.5". The INSIDE PANEL ROTATES 180° during production — design upright and the printer will handle the rotation.

Zone restrictions:
- NO-PRINT BORDER: 0.5" on all sides.

Design tips:
- The inside is HIPAA-compliant — it's sealed until the recipient tears it open. Use this for sensitive information (medical, financial, legal).
- Both inside panels (top and bottom) are fully customizable within the safe zone.
- Design upright — the inside panel rotates 180° during production.
- The fold crease runs horizontally at the center — avoid critical text directly on it.
- Merge variables like {{name}}, {{account_number}} can be used anywhere in the safe zone.
- Remember: no edge-to-edge color — the 0.5" white border is always visible.

notes: NO BLEED format — 0.5" no-print border, NOT 0.125" bleed.
Pressure-sealed with perforated sides — recipients tear open.
Inside panel rotates 180° during production — design upright.
High open rates due to the sealed format.
